source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Tank A has a volume of 100 L and contains saturated vapor R-134a at 30\circ\text{C}. When the valve is cracked open, R-134a flows slowly into cylinder B. The piston requires a pressure of 200 kPa in cylinder B to raise it. The process ends when the pressure in tank A has fallen to 200 kPa. During this process, heat is exchanged with the surroundings such that the R-134a always remains at 30\circ\text{C}. Find the heat transfer of the process.

The process ends when the pressure in tank A has fallen to 200 kPa. During this process, heat is exchanged with the surroundings such that the R-134a always remains at 30\circ\text{C}. Find the heat transfer of the process.
